rationale.R1.6: The agent provided a thorough rewrite with consistent register and no lost meaning, indicating careful copy-editing.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly disclosed uncertainties and used placeholders where information was missing.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; instead, problematic patterns were identified and fixed.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes were traced, minor edits lacked annotations, so only major rewrites were properly traced.
